calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-01-2006 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: 9:34am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott A. Myles, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
Cause called for Small claims appeal. Brian Ten appears as Pro Per representative for Enterprise Rent-a-car. Lashawn Thibodeux, appellant, appears in Pro Per. Parties are sworn and testify in the narrative. As the case seems close to settlement Judge Myles asks parties to step outside and discuss settling the case.
9:46am
Parties return to the courtroom and the matter is subsequently dismissed as settled with the following terms: Ms. Thibodeux is to pay outstanding amount of $1229.00 to Enterprise Rent-a-car in monthly installments of $125.00 a month until paid. Respondent is to provide appellant with receipts.
9:50am
Court adjourns. All evidence in the file was returned to the parties.
